chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD R.A. No. 23 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 11.03.2025 For orders as to non-prosecution None present Counsel for applicant is called absent. The office has fixed this matter for non-prosecution as neither cost has been paid nor copies have been supplied for issuing notices to the other side and further Security of Rupees Two Million as ordered by this court has also not been deposited. Today no one is present for applicant and no intimation is received and there is visible non-compliance of court’s order; therefore, this matter is dismissed for non- prosecution. JUDGE karar_hussain/PS*
